spread_definition.name: Hi-Lo 1-12 Common Spread (TC cuts)
spread_definition.description: Common 1-12 spread for comparison testing across all counting systems. 7 tiers with equivalent spacing.
spread_definition.notes: 7-tier spread designed for cross-system comparison. TC thresholds match typical Hi-Lo aggressive play.

meta.notes: Adds count- and rule-agnostic telemetry for accuracy & regression. Adds actions_by_state_upcard_first (first-decision only).
meta.insurance_fix: Insurance net calculation corrected to: 1.5 * payout_units - bet_units
